purpose: Record and communicate formal institutional orders, decrees, or decisions with clear legal or administrative effect.
typical_use_cases: Formalizing a decision of a director or board
Documenting changes to procedures or responsibilities
selection_hints: The request mentions an 'order', 'decree', or formal decision document
The content has binding or directive force
The structure needs numbered articles or points

header.purpose: Identify the issuing institution and organizational unit.

title.purpose: Provide a concise title summarizing the order or decree.

preamble.purpose: Briefly state the context and overall intent of the order.

background.purpose: Summarize relevant circumstances, prior decisions, or motivations.

legal_basis.purpose: List legal or regulatory grounds authorizing the decision.

decision_points.purpose: Enumerate the operative provisions, usually as numbered items or articles.

effective_date.purpose: Indicate when the order enters into force and any transition periods.

attachments_note.purpose: List annexes or supporting documents attached to the order.

distribution_list.purpose: Specify internal or external recipients responsible for execution or awareness.

signature_block.purpose: Provide the name, title, and signature line of the authorized decision‑maker.

planner_notes: Use this format when the task involves a formal decision document with clear operative provisions. Emphasize the separation between background, legal basis, and operative decision points. Leave legal phrasing and institutional tone to GILE.
